Raw to Ready: Getting Your Data AI-Ready with dbt
J

Hosted by jammie s.

Uyo dbt Meetup
No reviews yet
Details

AI is only as powerful as the data behind it. In this session, you'll discover how dbt (data build tool) helps teams clean, transform, and structure raw data—turning it into a solid foundation for machine learning and advanced analytics.
What You’ll Learn:

How to turn messy data into clean, AI-ready datasets
A practical blueprint for building robust data models
How to integrate dbt with your machine learning workflow
Real-world insights from a seasoned data scientist

🎙️ Guest Speaker:
Chima Caleb – Machine Learning Engineer & Data Scientist
Whether you're into Data Engineering, Data Science, or ML, this event will give you the tools to take your data from raw to ready.

***

Speaker
Chima Caleb

Machine Learning Engineer/Data Scientist

events.raw_text:

This event has passed

Report Ad
Community AMA with Erica Louie (dbt Labs)
Network event
D

Hosted by dbt L.

Super Organizer

Uyo dbt Meetup
No reviews yet
Details

REGISTER HERE 👉 https://www.getdbt.com/resources/webinars/community-slack-ama

🚀 Hey Community! Are you ready to dive deep, get insights, and satisfy your curiosity?

We’re hosting monthly live Ask Me Anything events! It's the perfect platform to quench your curiosity and get to know each other better. Don't miss out on this opportunity to connect and learn together.

What to Expect:

Discussing trends in the analytics space
Sharing key takeaways from the recent events
Hearing your questions and thoughts

Speaker: Erica Louie, Data @ dbt Labs
Host: Bolaji Oyejide, Digital Community Mgr @ dbt Labs
Topic: Careers in data, building a data team, the dbt Semantic Layer, and scaling your dbt project
When: November 21st @ 2pm EST
Where: Virtual and in #dbt-community-merge

Erica was the second employee at dbt Labs, then called Fishtown Analytics and she's seen dbt grow, a lot. In this AMA, Erica will share more on her career in data, her strong opinions on building a data team, how she manages her team, the dbt Semantic Layer, scaling your dbt project, and more on her Substack.

Register now to get the link to watch and join the #dbt-community-ama channel in Slack to participate live!

Read more
Speaker
Erica Louie, dbt Labs

Second hire at dbt Labs, former Head of Data, and now leading the product data team (and previously worked for BuzzFeed's data team), Erica "ric" Louie proudly hails from a liberal arts background (studied political science + italian) and grew her career in data at dbt Labs starting from the ground-up. She firmly believes that anyone can be a data practitioner with the right mentors, resources (sans trivial data jargon), and a good sense of humor. While rethinking the philosophy behind data systems, operations, and teams is one of her favorite topics, she enjoys thinking and writing about the human experience, and how it intersects with the work we choose to do and who we choose to do it with.

🚀 Hey Community! Are you ready to dive deep, get insights, and satisfy your curiosity?

We’re hosting monthly live Ask Me Anything events! It's the perfect platform to quench your curiosity and get to know each other better. Don't miss out on this opportunity to connect and learn together.

What to Expect:

Discussing trends in the analytics space
Sharing key takeaways from the recent events
Hearing your questions and thoughts

Speaker: Alex Welch, Head of Data @dbt Labs
Topic: BI Tools & Semantic Layer
When: June 27 @ 4pm EST
Where: Virtual and in #dbt-community-merge

Whether you’re looking at flight data, sales figures, consumer transactions, or biometric stats — access to the correct sources + a well-trained user + BI tools + dbt = data that works!!
This month we have Alex Welch, Head of Data at dbt Labs, to answer questions and discuss more about BI tools, analytics trends & the Semantic Layer!

Register now to get the link to watch and join the #dbt-community-merge channel in Slack to participate live!

theBUNKer Uyo

32 B G Bassey Ave · Uyo

Report Ad
Building your first dbt model: zero to hero
J

Hosted by jammie s.

Uyo dbt Meetup
No reviews yet
Details

🚀 Welcome to our Data Build Tool (dbt) Meetup! 🚀

Are you passionate about leveraging data to drive insights and decisions within your organization? Join us for our monthly dbt meetup where data enthusiasts come together to explore, learn, and collaborate on all things related to dbt and modern data analytics practices.

To attend, please read the Health and Safety Policy and Terms of Participation: https://bit.ly/4azcreT

🔍 What is dbt? dbt allows teams to ship trusted data products, faster. dbt is a data transformation framework that lets analysts and engineers collaborate using their shared knowledge of SQL. Through the application of software engineering best practices like modularity, version control, testing, and documentation, dbt’s analytics engineering workflow helps teams work more efficiently to produce data the entire organization can trust.
Learn more: https://www.getdbt.com/

🤝 What to Expect:

Engaging discussions on best practices, tips, and tricks for using dbt in real-world scenarios
Hands-on workshops and tutorials to deepen your understanding of dbt and related technologies

Whether you're a seasoned dbt user or just getting started with data transformation tools, our meetup provides a welcoming environment to expand your knowledge, exchange ideas, and connect with like-minded individuals passionate about data.

Join us in shaping the future of data analytics with dbt!

Read more

Sat, Jun 17, 2023 · 12:00 PM to 3:00 PM GMT+1

3 Chubb Rd

3 Chubb Rd · Ikot Ekpene, Ak

Report Ad
Uyo dbt Meetup
J

Hosted by jammie s. and dbt L.

dbt L. is a Super Organizer

Uyo dbt Meetup
No reviews yet
Details

dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data! Talks predominantly focus on community members' experience with dbt, however, you'll catch presentations on broader topics such as analytics engineering, data stacks, data ops, modeling, testing, and team structures.

🏠Venue Host: Future Labs, 3 Chubb Rd, 530101, Ikot Ekpene, Akwa Ibom
🍕Catering: TBA
🤝Organizer: James Sandy & Future Labs

To attend, please read the Required Participation Language for In-Person Events with dbt Labs: https://bit.ly/3QIJXFb

📝Agenda

12:00 - 12:30 | Check-in/Registration (30 min)
12:30 - 12:40 | Welcome Remarks by Meetup Host (5 min)
12:40 - 1:10 | Presentation 1 (30 min)
1:10 - 1:20 | Hands-on session (30 min)
1:20 - 1:50 | Presentation 2 (15-20 min)
1:50 - 2:20 | Hands-on session 2 (5 min)
2:20 - 2:30 | Closing Remarks by Meetup Host (5 min)
Call for speakers for next time and raise your hand if you are hiring and please state the company and role briefly
2:30 - 3:30 | Reception (1 hour)

🗣️Presentation #1: Starting and leveling up your career in the Data world

Description: This presentation will have two focuses, it will give beginners pointers on what it is like working in the data team and how to get started and the second focus will be to help exiting data practitioners level up their careers.

Speaker bio: Ini-Abasi Affiah, Data Scientist

---

🗣️Presentation #2: DBT for everyone

Description: This presentation will give a good introduction to DBT, how data teams all around the world are using it, and how you and your team can also get started with it.

Speaker bio: James Sandy, Data Engineer

EVENT DETAILS:
The doors open at. Presentations begin at. Food and refreshments will be provided. (If applicable)
Our venue has capacity limits, so please only RSVP if you intend to come and reach out to \ if you need to cancel last minute or change your RSVP status on the Meetup to "Not Going."
\

➡️ Join the dbt Slack community: https://www.getdbt.com/community/
🤝For the best Meetup experience, make sure to join the #local-nigeria channel in dbt Slack (https://slack.getdbt.com/).

Through the application of software engineering best practices like modularity, version control, testing, and documentation, dbt’s analytics engineering workflow helps teams work more efficiently to produce data the entire organization can trust.

Learn more: https://www.getdbt.com/
